summary:
Claim: Helmet cells are characteristic of anemia of spherocytosis.  
Evidence: - Helmet cells arise from loss of cytoplasmic content due to defective spectrin network, impairing membrane stability. - They lack central pallor and have increased surface area-to-volume ratio, appearing spherical on microscopic examination.  
Answer: C

Evidence: - Helmet cells arise from loss of cytoplasmic content due to defective spectrin network, impairing membrane stability. - They lack central pallor and have increased surface area-to-volume ratio, appearing spherical on microscopic examination.  
Answer: C. Answer choice: C
